basic_details.job_title: HAL ITI Trade Apprentices Recruitment 2026 Notification Out – Walk in for 205 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Hindustan Aeronautics Limited (HAL), Avionics Division, Hyderabad (A Maharatna CPSE)
basic_details.department: Department of Training & Development, Avionics Division, HAL Hyderabad
basic_details.job_location: Hindustan Aeronautics Limited, Avionics Division, Balanagar, Hyderabad – 500042
basic_details.short_information: HAL Hyderabad ITI Trade Apprentice Recruitment 2026: Get the latest HAL Hyderabad recruitment notification 2026 for 205 ITI Trade Apprentice vacancies under Hindustan Aeronautics Limited (HAL), Avionics Division, Hyderabad, Department of Training & Development, Balanagar, Hyderabad – 500042. The walk-in interview process starts on 28th May 2026 and the last date of walk-in interview is 1st June 2026. Find HAL Hyderabad vacancies at Balanagar, Hyderabad on the official website www.hal-india.co.in. You can also get Free Job Alert of “Upcoming HAL Hyderabad ITI Apprentice Recruitment 2026” notifi

qualification.details: Candidates must be ITI passed in the respective trades recognized by NCVT. Candidates who have already undergone Apprenticeship Training or who are undergoing similar apprenticeship training or are registered for Apprentice training in the respective discipline under the Apprentice Act elsewhere are not eligible. Candidates who have passed Apprenticeship under Centre of Excellence (COE) scheme need not apply. Candidates who have already joined / are pursuing / are about to join any regular courses for higher education during the stipulated Training Period need not apply. | Candidates must register on www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in portal and enter their NAME as it appears in SSC/10th Certificate. It is mandatory to upload SSC Marks Certificate, ITI Marks Certificate (all semesters), Aadhaar card number, Photograph, signature, and KYC verification on the portal before attending the walk-in interview. | Educational Qualification: Passed ITI in the respective Trade (NCVT approved only) | Reservation | Reservations for engagement of Apprentices shall be applicable for EWS, OBC, SC, ST, PH Candidates, Ex-Servicemen as per the Apprentices Act 1961 & Rules and subsequent amendments and for wards of HAL as per HAL Corporate Office Guidelines. OBC candidates must produce a valid Non-Creamy Layer certificate.

salary_details.pay_scale: As per the Apprentices Act 1961 & Rules and subsequent amendments (paid monthly)

selection_process: Stage 1 Mandatory pre-registration on www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in with all documents uploaded
Stage 2 Walk-in on the respective trade date with all original documents and photocopies
Stage 3 Merit-based shortlisting: SSC/10th marks (70% weightage) + ITI marks (30% weightage)
how_to_apply: Interested and eligible candidates must walk-in on the respective date and reporting time as per the trade-wise schedule at Utsav Sadan Auditorium, Behind Department of Training & Development, Hindustan Aeronautics Limited, Avionics Division, Balanagar, Hyderabad – 500042. There is no separate online application on the HAL website.

Before appearing for the walk-in, candidates must register on www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in and upload all required documents. Candidates must enter their name as it appears in the SSC/10th Certificate on the portal. Candidates must also enter a valid email ID and contact mobile number, along with ITI Certificate number, Aadhaar card number, Date of Birth, Category, Council, and Trade details on the web portal. HAL shall not be responsible for any application being rejected or candidate not shortlisted due to incorrect data entered on the portal.
Candidates must make their own arrangements for accommodation and travelling for the walk-in process and joining the apprenticeship. No accommodation or travel reimbursement will be provided by HAL.
Documents Required at the Time of Walk-in:
important_instructions: Selection is purely merit-based on SSC/10th marks (70% weightage) and ITI marks (30% weightage); there will be no written test or interview. Registration on www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in is mandatory before appearing for the walk-in interview. Candidates must upload SSC Marks Certificate, ITI Marks Certificate (all semesters), Aadhaar card number, photograph, signature, and KYC verification on the portal. Candidates must enter their name as it appears in the SSC/10th Certificate on the portal. Candidates who have already undergone or are currently undergoing Apprenticeship Training or registered for Apprentice Training elsewhere under the Apprentices Act are not eligible. Candidates who have passed Apprenticeship under the Centre of Excellence (COE) scheme need not apply. Candidates who have already joined/are pursuing/are about to join any regular courses for higher education during the stipulated Training Period need not apply. OBC candidates must produce a valid Non-Creamy Layer certificate. Merit list of selected candidates will be published on www.hal-india.co.in on 26th June 2026. Date of joining/reporting for the Apprenticeship is 17th July 2026; failure to report by the scheduled date will result in forfeiture of candidature. Submission of false/incorrect information or suppression of any facts at any stage will result in immediate cancellation/termination of candidature. Canvassing in any form will be treated as disqualification. HAL reserves the right to alter the allocation of quota for trades at any time and to cancel the advertisement/selection process; HAL Management's decision regarding selection will be final. Candidates must make their own arrangements for accommodation and travelling for the walk-in process and joining. For further queries/clarifications, email: [email protected] or contact: 040-23778283 (09:00 Hrs to 16:00 Hrs). For issues related to the web portal www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in (operated by DGT, Govt. of India), candidates must contact the helpline numbers on the portal; HAL will not entertain correspondence regarding portal functionality.
